e8_240.note: 120 unit icosians under trace form = 120 norm-2 E8-compatible roots (half-shell); exact 240-root E8 needs the SECOND icosian shell (short-vector enumeration of the icosian ring) -- not the phi-scaled copy (that has norm 4). Deferred to H4-E8 short-vector follow-on.

verdict: trace form c=1+1/sqrt5 FIXES integrality: 120 vertices -> norm 2, inner products in {-2..2} (E8-COMPATIBLE), derived (Tr c=2 + integrality), NOT tuned; classical 5x24-cell partition of the 600-cell VERIFIED (compound of five 24-cells = cosets of 2T in 2I). Both are KNOWN results (Wilson icosian/Q(sqrt5); compound of five 24-cells), VERIFIED exactly, NOT VFD discoveries.
